pi_items.verified_value: woocommerce_email_from_name is a valid WooCommerce option name
pi_items.source: WooCommerce official documentation and code references confirm this as a valid option for email sender name configuration

pi_items.verified_value: woocommerce_email_from_address is a valid WooCommerce option name; email format is syntactically valid
pi_items.source: WooCommerce official documentation confirms this as the option for email sender address; email validation confirms support@woocommercestore.com is a properly formatted email address
HTTP HEAD request to the URL returns 404 Not Found; URL does not exist. The option name itself is valid, but the claimed image URL is broken.

privileged_info_summary: All eight database option names (woocommerce_email_from_name, woocommerce_email_from_address, woocommerce_email_header_image, woocommerce_email_footer_text, woocommerce_email_base_color, woocommerce_email_background_color, woocommerce_email_body_background_color, woocommerce_email_text_color) are confirmed as valid WooCommerce email settings that store data in the wp_options table. All seven text and color values have valid formats (email address, valid hex color codes, and plain text). However, the header image URL (https://woocommerce.com/wp-content/themes/flavor/flavor/images/woo-nav-logo.svg) returns an HTTP 404 error and does not exist. This is the only contradicted claim in the task metadata. The task uses synthetic data (task-specific configuration values) rather than real-world datasets.
